citation_tightness.note: All factual claims are cited with adjacent markers [1]-[10], including conflicting sources and limitations.

completeness.note: Major evidence rows (primary trials, regulatory status, safety, market dynamics) are addressed, with limitations acknowledged.

flow.note: Sections follow a logical progression (comparative, regulatory, population, long-term, limitations), though some subsections could better integrate evidence and context.

hedging_appropriateness.note: Properly flags disagreements between sources (e.g., Eli Lilly vs. Novo Nordisk) without overconfidence.

tone_consistency.note: Tone remains evidence-grounded, avoiding promotional language or biased phrasing.
